CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210067523) / COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES AND INJUNCTIVE RELIEF FOR: (1)-(5) VIOLATIONS OF CALIFORNIA FAIR EMPLOYMENT AND HOUSING ACT, GOVT. CODE SECS 12929, 12955, ET SEQ. (TERMINATION OF LEASE; FAILURE TO PROVIDE REASONABLE ACCOMMODATION; FAILURE TO ENGAGE IN THE INTERACTIVE PROCESS; DISCRIMINATORY FEES; RETALIATION); (6) BREACH OF CONTRACT; (7) NEGLIGENCE; (8) BREACH OF THE IMPLIED WARRANTY OF HABITABILITY - CONTRACT; (9) BREACH OF THE STATUTORY WARRANTY OF HABITABILITY - TORT; (10) NUISANCE; (11) CONSTRUCTIVE EVICTION; (12) BREACH OF COVENANT OF QUIET ENJOYMENT; (13) VIOLATION OF CIVIL CODE SEC 1942.4; (14) UNLAWFUL RETALIATION (CIV.
